# TTLock Open Platform

<iframe data-v-a6887e72="" id="frame" name="frame" src="/documentPages/htmlPages/cloud/lockUpgrade/recheckEn.html" width="101%" height="1300" frameborder="0" scrolling="auto"></iframe>

## Embedded Content

# Upgrade recheck

**`https://euapi.ttlock.com/v3/lock/upgradeRecheck`**

When `"unkown"` is returned requesting [Upgrade check](/document/doc?urlName=cloud/lockUpgrade/checkEn.html), you have to call [APP SDK](/document/doc?urlName=appSdkV3/androidSdkDemoV3/downloadEn.html) method to get new `lockData`, and request this API to see whether there is any upgrade for a lock.

Notice: Please make sure the `lockData` is from the [APP SDK](/document/doc?urlName=appSdkV3/androidSdkDemoV3/downloadEn.html) method.

### 1 Request example

`POST, ContentType:application/x-www-form-urlencoded`

xxxxxxxxxx

curl \--location \-g \--request POST 'https://euapi.ttlock.com/v3/lock/upgradeRecheck' \\

\--data\-urlencode 'clientId=4773aa036f7f49c68d876bb4be85c80c' \\

\--data\-urlencode 'accessToken=dfd5489d0cee31f0bdfaf59d0d42d71f' \\

\--data\-urlencode 'lockId=163377' \\

\--data\-urlencode 'lockData=xxxxxxxxx' \\

\--data\-urlencode 'date=1625025703000'

### 2 Request parameters

Name

Type

Required

Description

clientId

String

Y

client\_id from [Create application](/CreateApplication)

accessToken

String

Y

Access token，refer to: [Get access token](/document/doc?urlName=cloud/oauth2/getAccessTokenEn.html)

lockId

Int

Y

Lock ID, generated by [Lock init](/document/doc?urlName=cloud/lock/initializeEn.html)

lockData

String

Y

Lock data, get from [APP SDK](/document/doc?urlName=appSdkV3/androidSdkDemoV3/downloadEn.html)

date

Long

Y

Current time (timestamp in millisecond)

### 3 Response and example

Parameter

Type

Description

needUpgrade

Int

Is upgrading available: 0-No, 1-Yes, 2-Unknown

firmwareInfo

String

Firmware info

firmwarePackage

String

Firmware package

version

String

Latest firmware version

xxxxxxxxxx

{

    "needUpgrade":1,

    "firmwareInfo":{

        "modelNum":"SN242-SYNO\_PV53",

        "hardwareRevision":"1.1",

        "firmwareRevision":"5.1.0.200305"

    },

 "firmwarePackage":"",

    "version":"5.3.3.210520"

}
